series.curator_notes: Kinderlieder and children's music series. Themed seasonal and occasion-based collections (Frühling, Sommer, Herbst, Winter, Weihnachten, Ostern, Geburtstag, etc.) rather than numbered episodes. Includes some collaborative releases (e.g., 'Pummeleinhorn präsentiert'). Some titles include release years in parentheses. Features sub-series like 'Kinderlieder für die Kleinen' targeting specific age groups or activities (Babyschwimmen, Krippe).

review.notes: Auto-approved: no gaps or duplicates found.
